about.title: About
about.subtitle: Where creativity meets strategy — design with purpose
about.heading: Design is not an accident
about.text1: NOIR Studio was founded in 2019 in Berlin — with the conviction that great design delivers measurable results. We work at the intersection of strategy, aesthetics, and technology.
about.text2: From brand development and UI/UX design to digital implementation: we guide our clients holistically and create experiences that stick.

testimonials.title: What Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Feedback from companies we work with

items.name: Julia Hartmann
items.text: NOIR completely reimagined our brand. The result: a presence that fits us perfectly and instantly builds trust with our customers. Absolutely professional.

items.name: Maximilian Vogel
items.text: The collaboration was top-tier from day one. NOIR understands not just design, but business. Our new website doubled our conversion rate.

items.name: Carla Reiter
items.text: From briefing to delivery — everything ran smoothly. The team thinks ahead, brings their own ideas, and delivers results that exceed expectations.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started

items.question: How does a project at NOIR work?
items.answer: Every project starts with a free initial consultation where we understand your goals and requirements. Then follows strategy, concept, design, and implementation — with regular feedback and transparent communication.

items.question: How much does a branding project cost?
items.answer: Costs depend on scope. A logo package starts at €3,000, comprehensive branding with strategy, visual identity, and guidelines from €8,000. We're happy to create a custom quote for you.

items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: A logo project typically takes 3–4 weeks, full branding 6–8 weeks. Web design projects range from 4 to 12 weeks depending on scope.

items.question: Do you work with startups?
items.answer: Absolutely. We regularly work with startups and scale-ups. For early stages, we offer lean packages that can grow with the company.

items.question: Do you also offer development?
items.answer: Yes, we implement our designs with modern technologies like Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS. Alternatively, we work closely with your development team.

cookie.message: We use cookies to provide you with the best possible experience on our website. By continuing to use the site, you agree to the use of cookies.

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.disclaimerText: The contents of our pages were created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, and timeliness of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages according to § 7 para.1 TMG under general laws.
impressum.copyrightText: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, processing, distribution, and any type of use beyond the limits of copyright require the written consent of the respective author or creator.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.generalText: The protection of your personal data is of particular concern to us. We therefore process your data exclusively on the basis of legal provisions (GDPR, TKG 2003). In this privacy policy, we inform you about the most important aspects of data processing within our website.
datenschutz.hostingText: Our website is hosted by Vercel Inc. When you visit our website, the server automatically collects log data such as your IP address, the browser used, the referrer URL, and the time of access. This data is needed to ensure smooth operation and is automatically deleted after 30 days.
datenschutz.cookiesText: Our website uses technically necessary cookies that are required for the operation of the site. These cookies do not contain personal data and are automatically deleted after your session. A cookie is set to save your cookie preferences.
datenschutz.contactFormText: If you send us inquiries via the contact form, your details from the form, including the contact data you provided, will be stored for the purpose of processing the inquiry and in case of follow-up questions. We do not share this data without your consent. Processing is done through the Web3Forms service.
datenschutz.rightsText: You generally have the rights to information, correction, deletion, restriction, data portability, revocation, and objection. If you believe that the processing of your data violates data protection law or your data protection rights have been violated in any way, you can file a complaint with the supervisory authority.
datenschutz.changesText: We reserve the right to adapt this privacy policy to ensure it always complies with current legal requirements or to implement changes to our services in the privacy policy.
